channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Martha Karua Talks About Choosing Natural Hair for Hairline Health
item.description: Veteran politician Martha Karua shared her journey of embracing natural hair in a candid TikTok video, explaining how she stopped using chemical treatments to protect her hairline. In the clip, Karua ...

item.title: Jennylyn Mercado Shares Insights from Her Beauty Business Journey
item.description: Jennylyn Mercado, a prominent figure in Philippine entertainment, has transitioned her decades-long career in the spotlight into a successful beauty business venture. The article highlights how her ex...

item.title: Delicious Orie believes Joe Joyce has stayed in boxing too long but says the final decision is personal
item.description: Former Commonwealth champion Delicious Orie has shared his thoughts on Joe Joyce’s future following the heavyweight’s latest defeat, suggesting that the veteran boxer may have continued his career lon...

item.title: African nations balance migration policies with domestic job creation
item.description: The article discusses how African governments are pushing young people to work abroad to tackle youth unemployment, but this approach has long-term implications. Countries like Ghana and Kenya have ex...

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for online bomb threats targeting Bulacan schools
item.description: An 18-year-old man, Alex Mariano, was arrested in Jaen, Nueva Ecija for posting online bomb threats that disrupted classes in public and private schools in San Ildefonso, Bulacan. The suspect was iden...

item.title: Samsung Unveils Galaxy Glasses with Snapdragon AR1 Gen 1 and Google Gemini AI, Launching This Fall
item.description: Samsung has officially launched its Galaxy Glasses, a new entry into the smart glasses market dominated by Meta. The device, unveiled at the Galaxy Unpacked event in London, features Qualcomm's Snapdr...

item.title: FC Cincinnati defeat Vancouver Whitecaps 4-3 with double from Bucha
item.description: FC Cincinnati secured a thrilling 4-3 victory over the Vancouver Whitecaps in a match filled with dramatic moments. Pavel Bucha was the standout performer, scoring twice to guide his team to the win. ...

item.title: South African sprinter Bayanda Walaza sets new national record in Slovakia
item.description: Bayanda Walaza, a 20-year-old South African sprinter, has made history by becoming the fourth-fastest athlete in the country's athletics history. His remarkable achievement came during a meet in Bansk...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Digital Platform to Modernize Fisheries Sector
item.description: Tanzania has introduced a digital platform called TanFish Marketplace to modernize its fisheries sector and boost economic growth. Developed by the University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) in partnership wi...

item.title: George Michael and Elton John's Unfinished Duet Could Be Released Posthumously

item.title: President Zardari Orders Enhanced Monsoon Preparedness Amid Rising Flood Risks
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari has directed federal, provincial, and local authorities to intensify coordinated preparedness, rescue, and relief measures amid ongoing monsoon rains. The directive comes as...

item.title: Dangote's Tanzanian Power Plant and Lamu Refinery Investments
item.description: Aliko Dangote, Africa's richest industrialist, has unveiled a major investment pipeline in Tanzania beyond his existing cement plant. The projects include a 2,000-megawatt coal-fired power plant, urea...

item.title: Maine Senate race tightens as Troy Jackson gains edge over Susan Collins
item.description: A University of New Hampshire poll reveals former Maine Senate President Troy Jackson has surged ahead of Republican Senator Susan Collins in the 2026 Senate race, with Jackson leading 49% to 46%. Thi...

item.title: Toronto FC and New England Revolution Draw 0-0 in Scoreless Match, Gavran Records Second Consecutive Clean Sheet
item.description: Toronto FC and New England Revolution played to a scoreless draw on Wednesday night, with Luka Gavran making four saves to secure his second consecutive clean sheet. The match, held in Foxborough, Mas...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Lacks President Ramaphosa's Testimony as Deadline Approaches

item.title: Top Platforms to Sell Gift Cards in Nigeria (2026)
item.description: The article outlines the best apps and websites for selling gift cards in Nigeria, focusing on platforms like Cardtonic that offer competitive rates and secure transactions. It emphasizes the importan...

item.title: Nairobi County Awards Scholarships to Support Vulnerable Students

item.title: New Malware Threats Target AI Infrastructure and Exploit System Blind Spots
